activation.definition: successful MCP startup and at least one route_query call

retention_7d.definition: users that return within 7 days after first successful activation

tool_success_rate.definition: successful MCP tool calls / total MCP tool calls

integration_time_minutes.definition: time from clone to first successful MCP command

notes: Populate value fields after first external onboarding cohort.
Keep this file as baseline snapshot for release decision logs.
